description: Fix Railway deployment 'Cannot GET' issue. Remove healthcheck from railway.json (Railway times out waiting for /api/health because DB seeding takes too long on first boot). Switch builder to NIXPACKS. Also convert _seed_questions to use executemany for bulk insert instead of inserting 10,000 rows one by one.
steps: Update railway.json: remove healthcheckPath and healthcheckTimeout from deploy section, change builder from DOCKERFILE to NIXPACKS, remove dockerfilePath.
Update app/database.py _seed_questions() to use cursor.executemany() with a list of tuples instead of a for-loop with cursor.execute() for each row.
acceptance_criteria: Database seeding uses executemany for bulk insert
